sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51528" key="i)xnope/dh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰχνο-πέδη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n51528.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fetter</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trap,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.109</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.626</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
